deliverables.title: Webots Product Overview
deliverables.audience: Prospects evaluating AARNN demonstrations, demo leads, and embodied-AI stakeholders
deliverables.goal: Show Webots as the browser-only embodiment surface tied directly to AARNN assets and shared commercial-site identity.

sections.title: Frictionless embodiment
sections.focus: No separate local desktop install or second account

sections.title: World selection
sections.focus: C. elegans, Drosophila, and NAO profiles

sections.title: AARNN linkage
sections.focus: Sensory and actuator mappings grounded in generated assets

sections.title: Commercial close
sections.focus: Why browser launch matters for demonstration velocity

avoid: presenting Webots as disconnected from AARNN

deliverables.title: Webots Training Walkthrough
deliverables.audience: Enablement teams, demo operators, and internal users
deliverables.goal: Show the launch flow from authenticated site session through world selection and browser runtime handoff.
deliverables.cta: Verify identity, world, and workspace before launch

sections.title: Session readiness
sections.focus: How the current site login and token state affect launch

sections.title: World and workspace choice
sections.focus: Picking the correct embodiment and workspace label

sections.title: Launch handoff
sections.focus: Submitting the access exchange and opening the browser runtime

sections.title: Post-launch checks
sections.focus: What to verify after the broker redirects the user

avoid: world-selection narration with no practical checks
